name: Kimchi Ramen
long_description:
Ottogi Kimchi Ramen offers a delicious, spicy and traditional Korean ramen. Inspired by the iconic Korean dish, kimchi, Ottogi Kimchi Ramen combines the spicy, tangy flavours of kimchi with the comforting goodness of ramen noodles, creating a uniquely satisfying culinary experience. Springy noodles are paired with a spicy-sour kimchi broth that will leave you wanting more. Crafted with premium ingredients and Ottogi's commitment to quality, each serving of Kimchi Ramen delivers a satisfying and nourishing meal experience. Just add boiling water, wait a few minutes, and enjoy the rich, flavorful broth and chewy noodles that will tantalize your taste buds and leave you craving more. It's convenient, delicious, and ready in minutes.

Each pack contains five individual servings, making it perfect for busy individuals or families on the go. Whether you are at work, school, or simply enjoying a cozy night in, Ottogi Kimchi Ramen is the perfect choice for a quick and delicious meal.

name: Kimchi Dumplings
long_description:
Immerse yourself in the vibrant flavours of Korea with our Kimchi Flavoured Dumplings. Each dumpling features a chunky filling of eight different vegetables, expertly crafted to maximise mouthful taste and juiciness. With every serving providing half of your daily vegetable intake and a rich source of protein, these dumplings offer a nutritious and delicious option for any meal. The authentic kimchi flavour, inspired by traditional Korean recipes, adds a delightful kick that elevates your dining experience. Enjoy them steamed, air-fried, or pan-fried for a perfect balance of health and indulgence.
  • Authentic Korean Flavour

  • Chunky Vegetable Filling

  • Half Daily Vegetable Intake

  • Rich Source of Protein

  • Convenient Meal Option

  • Versatile Cooking Methods.

  • Health-Conscious Choice.

  • Satisfying and Filling.

name: Cheese Rice Balls
long_description:
Loved by customers worldwide, bibigo Kimchi and Cheese Rice Balls deliver an unforgettable flavour experience. Each rice ball is crafted with tangy kimchi fried rice, filled with a gooey cheese centre, and wrapped in a crispy, golden-brown shell. Every bite offers a delightful mix of tangy, savoury, and cheesy flavours, making these rice balls perfect on their own or paired with your favourite side dishes for a more complete meal. Individually packaged for convenience, they're easy to prepare in either the microwave or air fryer, giving you a perfectly crispy exterior and melted centre every time. Ideal for meal prep, quick lunches, or a satisfying snack, these kimchi cheese rice balls bring a comforting and authentic taste to any table.
  • Authentic Flavour

  • Globally Loved

  • Convenient Meal Prep

  • Versatile Cooking Options

  • Crispy Exterior

  • Great on Its Own or Paired.

  • Source of Protein.

  • Perfect Balance of Flavours.

name: Sensations Soup Vietnamese Chicken
long_description:
Stir up a flavour Sensation with Cup A Soup Sensations, crafted with gourmet ingredients, Continental Soup Sensations not only look mouth-watering, they taste delicious too! Continental Soup Sensations Vietnamese Chicken & Shiitake Mushroom soup mix is expertly crafted to give you an explosive, taste sensation with every sip.A deliciously quick and easy to prepare snack to curb those cravings!Continental Soup Sensations contains no artificial colours or flavours and is proudly made in Australia.At Continental, we love food the way you do. We know how much you value good, nutritious, flavourful food, as well as authentic home cooking. Fill with boiling water and stir for 15 - 20 seconds.Stand for 1 minute and stir again before consuming.

name: Malaysian Peanut Satay
long_description:
With a slight hint of chilli blended with spices, garlic and peanuts, Malaysian Peanut Satay is perfect for any occasion. Just add Meat & Vegetables.

In homes, on the street, in restaurants - everywhere and often, people are preparing and eating satay; it is Malaysia's national dish! Everyone has a recipe, from generation to generation and in celebration of the diverse ethnic and cultural mix of the country. Perhaps this is why you will never weary of eating satay, variations abound. Seriously, eating could be the national pastime of Malaysia - everywhere and often! Simply said, satay is too scrumptious, with its smooth blend of spices and crunch of peanuts. You find yourself looking for more.

Now our culinary team are experts in preparing, and delight in eating, so were thrilled when asked to create a Peanut Satay Sauce that will have you calling for more. We only ask that you eat with joy!
ingredients: Water, Peanuts (16%), Sugar, Ginger, Garlic, Onion, Vegetable Powders, Dehydrated Vegetables, Salt, Vinegar, Spices, Food Acid (Citric), Natural Colours (Caramel I & Turmeric Oleoresin), Corn Starch, Lemongrass Puree, Sunflower Oil, Natural Flavours, Vegetable Gum (Xanthan)

name: Indian Naan Garlic 3 Pack
long_description:
We'll say it. Naan is a miracle, full stop. That chewy yet fluffy mouthfeel, that yoghurt tang, that garlic zing. There's no better way to put a spring in your saag paneer or a kick in your butter chicken. And with this Coles Indian Naan Garlic 3-Pack, there's no easier way, either.


After just 30 seconds in the microwave, it's ready to naan-chalantly elevate your Indian dinner to transcendence. You can't put a dollar value on naan-stop deliciousness like this. But fortunately, the price on this Coles Indian Naan Garlic 3-Pack is as easy to swallow as every irresistible bite.


We know there's a science to how some flour, a dash of yoghurt, and a handful of nigella seeds can transform into such a marvel on the human palate. But we can't help but sense some magic in there, too. Think we're exaggerating when we say miracle? This Coles Indian Naan Garlic 3-Pack will make you a naan-believer.

name: 2 Minute Noodles Masala
long_description:
The winter crop of coriander is harvested, and then sundried before separating the leaves and the whole seeds

The seeds are cleaned and inspected before reaching our partner facility

These are then part roasted, ground and then blended into your favourite Masala Tastemaker

The underground crop of turmeric is harvested in the first half of the year

The turmeric fingers are then boiled, dried and cleaned before reaching our partner facility

These are then part roasted, ground and then blended into your favourite Masala Tastemaker

All our chilies are chosen from selected local farms and are then handpicked and destalked

High quality chilies that pass all checks reach our partner facility

These are then part roasted, ground and then blended into your favourite Masala Tastemaker
ingredients: Noodle Cake - Wheat Flour, Vegetable Oil (Antioxidant (319)), Salt or Iodised Salt, Wheat Gluten, Mineral Salts (508, 451, 501, 500), Vegetable Gum (412), Tastemaker - Hydrolysed Peanut Protein, Noodle Cake Powder (contains Wheat), Sugar, Spices, Onion, Corn Starch, Garlic, Vegetable Oil (Antioxidant (319)), Salt or Iodised Salt, Colour (150d), Food Acid (Citric), Mineral Salts (508, 500), Flavour Enhancer (635)
allergens:

name: Spicy Butter Chicken
description: THE SPICE TAILOR SPICY BUTTER CHICKEN 300GM
long_description:
Our Spicy Butter Chicken Curry layers tangy tomato, spices, sweet onion, and fragrant ginger, with a punch of chilli to create a delicious, spicier version of our Classic Butter Chicken curry. Our Indian Curry Kits are truly versatile and come tailored with whole spices for distinctive flavour.

Follow the simple 3-step instructions inside the pack for a delicious, restaurant quality curry in just 10 minutes.

The Spice Tailor helps you cook restaurant quality meals at home in minutes. Whether you are a proficient cook or a kitchen novice, anyone can achieve delicious results with our easy-to-use kits. Just follow the simple 3-step instructions on the pack and have a mouth-watering meal on the table with minimal fuss, but maximum flavour.

Our kits come with a sachet of whole spices that impart clean and distinctive flavours to your dish. We prepare our sauces using a method inspired by chefs and home cooks, layering the ingredients step-by-step to build depth of flavour. We've done all the hard work for you so can relax and enjoy cooking your favourite spiced dishes in minutes.

  • Restaurant quality

  • Warm & Velvety

  • 3 Simple steps

  • Ready in 10 minutes

  • No artificial flavours, colours or preservatives

  • Chilli Rating: Medium.

  • Suitable for Vegetarians.

name: Olive Oil Spray
long_description:
Coles Simply Olive Oil Spray 400g.
  • Olive oil spray
  • Perfect for grilling, pan-frying, roasting and baking
  • No artificial colours and flavours
Coles Simply Olive Oil Spray enhances cooking performance and ensures food is uniformly covered and retains moisture and flavour without excess oil. So convenient and easy to use, Coles Simply Olive Oil Spray is a kitchen staple for all types of cooking and baking. Use it to lightly spray your pans before baking to ensure your cakes, muffins, tarts and biscuits slide out effortlessly without breaking. Or give food a light mist of Coles Simply Olive Oil Spray before it goes into the air fryer for a more even browning and crisp exterior while the spray nozzle cuts down on overall oil usage. Coles Simply Olive Oil Spray is perfect for grilling, pan-frying, roasting and stir-frying and great for preparing meat and vegetables to go on the barbeque. A quick spritz of Coles Simply Olive Oil Spray prevents food from sticking to grills and hotplates so there's less burning and easier clean-up.

name: Classic Butter Chicken
description: THE SPICE TAILOR CLASSIC BUTTER CHICKEN 300G
long_description:
Rich & Velvety.




This Spice Tailor range is truly versatile. Simply take your pick from the bits to buy, add the specially selected spices, stir in the sauce and you have a fresh, authentic Indian meal in just 10 minutes!




Our Classic Butter Chicken layers tangy tomatoes, gentle spices, sweet onions, fragrant ginger to create a delicious curry worthy of its title as King of Curries. - Anjum.




Creamy tomato, onion and cashew curry sauce with a creamy onion sauce base and mixed spices in individual pouches




Serves 2-3 in 10 minutes.




Mild.




No artificial preservatives, colourings or flavourings!

name: Butter Chicken Simmer Sauce Medium
description: PATAKS MEDIUM BUTTER CHICKEN SIMMER SAUCE 450G
long_description:
Patak's Butter Chicken Curry Sauce is a medium heat, creamy tomato and butter flavour curry sauce with aromatic spices. For those who like a little more heat.

Simply fry your meat, paneer or vegetables, pour over the sauce and simmer. All the hard work done for you: a tasty and authentic Butter Chicken curry in just 20 minutes.
Serve with Patak's Mini Pappadums, Naans, Chutneys and Pickles.

In search of something hotter? Why not try our Butter Chicken Spicy Curry Sauce?

Contains no artificial colours or preservatives.

Our Patak's sauce jars are 100% recyclable. Please rinse and recycle glass jars with the metal cap on, either at home or at your nearest glass recycling facility to help us minimise our environmental impact.

At Patak's, we have over 60 years of spice blending expertise so you know you are in good hands. Thanks Patak's !

Ginger powder is a delicious, aromatic flavour that is traditionally found in Asian cuisines and used to flavour stir-fries, meat, fish and vegetable dishes.
Ginger powder can also be used and combined into an array of yummy desserts such as, gingerbread, cakes, muffins, cookies, biscuits and even used to flavour heartwarming teas!

name: Rogan Josh Simmer Sauce Medium
long_description:
Patak's Rogan Josh Curry Sauce is a medium heat , rich tomato and onion flavour curry sauce with aromatic spices. For those who like a little more heat.

Simply fry your meat or vegetables, pour over the sauce and simmer. All the hard work done for you: a tasty and authentic Rogan Josh curry in just 20 minutes.
Serve with Patak's Mini Pappadums, Naans, Chutneys and Pickles.

In search of something hotter? Why not try our Madras curry sauce?

Contains no artificial flavours,colours or preservatives. Suitable for vegetarians.

Our Patak's sauce jars are 100% recyclable. Please rinse and recycle glass jars with the metal cap on, either at home or at your nearest glass recycling facility to help us minimise our environmental impact.

At Patak's, we have over 60 years of spice blending expertise so you know you are in good hands. Thanks Patak's !

name: Green Label Mango Chutney
long_description:
Our classic Mango Chutney goes down a treat.
Ready to eat straight from the jar, Sharwood's mango chutney goes down a treat with curry and it's the perfect accompaniment to
- Your favourite curries
- Naan breads or poppadoms
- Cold meat, cheese, burgers & sandwiches

Simply pour into a bowl and dip, dollop onto a poppadom or naan bread, or pop a spoon straight in the jar and let everyone serve themselves a spoonful.

Sharwood's mango chutney has no artificial colours or preservatives, and it's suitable for vegetarians.

Sharwood's seeks out the best flavours around the world to bring you exciting new dishes through our great tasting sauces and accompaniments. Start your flavour adventure from the comfort of your home with Sharwood's.

  • Ready to Eat

  • Low in Fat

  • No Artificial Colours or Preservatives

  • Suitable for vegetarians

  • Chilli Rating: 1

name: Butter Chicken Simmer Sauce
long_description:
Craving a butter chicken curry? This Sharwood's mild butter chicken cooking sauce is a hassle-free way to rustle up your favourite Indian meal at home.


A rich and creamy mix of tomatoes, cream and butter, it's ideal for a fast but tasty family meal. Just stir-fry diced chicken, add the butter chicken cooking sauce, and simmer until the chicken is cooked through.

Serve it with flame-baked naans and a generous dollop of tangy mango chutney and you've got a hearty family dish.

With no added MSG and no artificial colours or preservatives, this butter chicken cooking sauce is also suitable for vegetarians if you substitute the chicken for a tasty alternative.

Please ensure food is fully cooked before serving.

  • Ready in 15 minutes

  • No Artificial Colours, Preservatives

  • Suitable for Vegetarians

  • Chilli rating: Mild

name: Tikka Masala Simmer Sauce
long_description:
A classic Indian curry sauce with tomatoes, yoghurt and cream.

1. Simply fry 2-3 diced chicken breasts (500g) in a little oil until browned.
2. Add the sauce and simmer for 4-5 more minutes until all is cooked through.

Serve with rice, Naans and Sharwood's Chutney for a tangy twist to your meal.

Also great with your favourite protein alternative.
Please ensure food is fully cooked before serving.
  • Ready in 15 minutes

  • No Artificial Colours

  • No Artificial Preservatives

  • Suitable for Vegetarians

  • Chilli Rating: Mild

name: Delicate Korma Curry
description: THE SPICE TAILOR DELICATE KORMA CURRY 300G
long_description:
This Delicate Korma Curry - an adaptation of the restaurant favourite - is a subtle blend of coconut, cream and nuts, combined with a gentle use of spices for a refined and regal dish.

The Spice Tailor range is truly versatile. Simply take your pick from the bits to buy, add the specially selected spices, stir in the sauce and you have a fresh, authentic Indian meal in just 10 minutes! 


No artificial colouring, flavourings or preservatives!

  • Nutty & Aromatic.

  • 3 Simple steps

  • Ready in 10 minutes

  • No artificial colouring, flavourings or preservatives!

  • Vegetarian friendly

  • Restaurant quality.

long_description:
Distinctive & Bold.

The Spice Tailor range is truly versatile. Simply take your pick from the bits to buy, add the specially selected spices, stir in the sauce and you have a fresh, authentic Indian meal in just 10 minutes!

The Original Tikka Masala layers sweet tomatoes, warming garlic and fragrant ginger with fenugreek and gentle spices to create a delicious, complex and colourful dish. - Anjum.

A mild and creamy tomato curry sauce with onion, mixed herbs and spices in individual pouches.

Serves 2-3 in 10 mins.

Mild.

No artificial preservatives, colouring or flavourings.

name: Tikka Masala Simmer Sauce Medium
long_description:
Patak's Tikka Masala Curry Sauce is a medium heat , rich and creamy tomato flavour curry sauce with aromatic spices. For those who like a little more heat.

Simply fry your meat or vegetables, pour over the sauce and simmer. All the hard work done for you: a tasty and authentic Tikka Masala curry in just 20 minutes.
Serve with Patak's Mini Pappadums, Naans, Chutneys and Pickles.

In search of something hotter? Why not try our Madras Curry Sauce?

Contains no artificial flavours,colours or preservatives. Suitable for vegetarians.

Our Patak's sauce jars are 100% recyclable. Please rinse and recycle glass jars with the metal cap on, either at home or at your nearest glass recycling facility to help us minimise our environmental impact.

At Patak's, we have over 60 years of spice blending expertise so you know you are in good hands. Thanks Patak's !

name: Korma Simmer Sauce
long_description:
Create your favourite curry dish at home with Sharwood's korma cooking sauce. Creamy, coconutty, and perfectly balanced, it'll be a hit with the whole family.

A classic blend of coconut with cream and tomatoes, this korma cooking sauce is quick and easy to prepare. Just stir-fry diced chicken, add the cooking sauce and simmer, and you've got yourself a delicious Indian meal in minutes.

With no added MSG and no artificial colours or preservatives, this korma cooking sauce is also suitable for vegetarians.


Pair it rice and naan with a generous dollop of tangy mango chutney for a filling family meal.

  • Ready in 15 minutes

  • No Artificial Colours

  • No Artificial Preservatives

  • Suitable for vegetarians

  • Chilli Rating: mild

name: Burrito Tortilla Wraps 10 Pack
long_description:
Our Coles Burrito Tortilla Wraps 10 Pack are made for families (or a couple of very hungry humans). While many taquerias gravitate to the traditional corn tortillas, Coles Burrito Tortilla Wraps are a soft flour alternative that offer a perfectly pliant texture with an ever-so-slightly-sweet flavour. A lightly warmed Coles Burrito Tortilla is ideal for neatly wrapping up an assortment of your favourite ingredients: tomatoes, spinach, beans, spicey chicken, onion and sweet corn.


Practically proportioned for a hearty serve of burrito or a set of quesadillas filled with an excessive amount of cheese (always a crowd-pleaser). Our Coles Burrito Tortillas aim to please, a must-have pantry staple, always at the ready for all your favourites within the Mexican and Tex-Mex culinary catalogue.


Serving tip: when using our flour tortillas to build burritos, we suggest heating them up slightly first. You can do this in the microwave, oven or drop it in a hot skillet momentarily. They'll become even more supple and workable when warm, so you can avoid tearing.
ingredients: INGREDIENTS: Wheat Flour (59%) [Folic Acid, Thiamine], Water, Vegetable Shortening [Palm Oil**], Caster Sugar, Iodised Salt, Baking Powder [Mineral Salts (500, 450), Acidity Regulator (341)], Acidity Regulator (297), Preservatives (282, 200), Mineral Salt (500), Yeast.

name: Chicken Flavour Gravy Granules
long_description:
Bisto Chicken Flavour Gravy Granules is as convenient as it is versatile. Just mix with boiling water, stir and enjoy a deliciously smooth gravy. Bisto Chicken Flavour Gravy Granules bring all the flavour while being low in sugar and fat (when prepared as directed with water). Simply put four heaped teaspoons into a jug and add 280mL of boiling water to prepare. Enjoy poured over roast chicken or vegetables, whether it's a quick weeknight meal or a hearty Sunday lunch.
  • Delicious paired with chicken

  • Easy prep with boiling water

  • Low sugar (When prepared as directed with water)

  • Low fat (When prepared as directed with water)

  • 51 servings per package

name: Original Piccalilli
long_description: Piccalilli is a mild mustard, turmeric and vinegar based sauce with the addition of chopped onions and cauliflower florets to make a relish type chutney. It is a very popular, typically English, tangy relish which can be eaten with cold meats such as ham, sandwiches, snacks and salads. It is a traditional English mainstay relish with savoury food. Fact: Piccalilli dates back the middle of the 18th century when it was originally named 'little pickle' and later 'mustard pickle' and today it is fondly known as 'Piccalilli'. Traditional English Piccalilli is ready to eat.
ingredients: Vegetables in variable proportions (Cauliflower, Fresh Onions), Water, Barley Malt Vinegar, Modified Maize Starch, Sugar, Mustard Flour, Turmeric, Acid (Acetic Acid), Salt, Preservative (Sodium Metabisulphite)

name: Yorkshire Pudding Mix & Pancakes
long_description: Goldenfry's Yorkshire Pancake and Pudding Mix is both a crepe style pancake mix and a savoury pudding. A favourite dish in Yorkshire, Goldenfry Yorkshire Pancake & Pudding Mix is so easy and guarantees fantastic results. Just add an egg and follow the simple instructions on the back of the box, add an extra egg an your pudding will rise even higher! Pair the pudding with traditional roast beef to make an unforgettable British dinner! Goldenfry is Yorkshire through and through and is still a family business today after 70 years of food history. Based in Yorkshire, Goldenfry offers wholesome, great tasting food accompaniments to give people a bit of help at meal times without scrimping on flavour. Products we want to eat - simple and tasty! Over the decades Goldenfry has grown to become a leading supplier or meal accompaniments to the UK grocery retail and wholesale markets.
ingredients: Wheat Flour, Milk Powder, Salt, Dried Egg

name: Beef Gravy Granules
long_description: Goldenfry makes gravy to a brilliant traditional recipe so you never have to make gravy from scratch every again. Make classic rich gravy in minutes! Smooth & Rich Gravy granules are the perfect addition to any delicious roast! Stir with boiling water to create the perfect topping to complement roasts, steaks and other grilled meats. Simply put 8 heaped teaspoons (40g) into a measuring jug and add 250ml of boiling water. Stir until smooth and serve. Goldenfry is Yorkshire through and through and is still a family business today after 70 years of food history. Based in Yorkshire, Goldenfry offers wholesome, great tasting food accompaniments to give people a bit of help at meal times without scrimping on flavour. Products we want to eat - simple and tasty! Over the decades Goldenfry has grown to become a leading supplier or meal accompaniments to the UK grocery retail and wholesale markets.

name: Fruit Gums
long_description:
An sharing bag of our fruity-flavoured gums
Satisfyingly chewy sweets
Blackcurrant, lemon, strawberry, lime and orange flavours
No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives
Rowntree's Fruit Gums are epically fruity-tasting gummy sweets in five delicious flavours. From blackcurrant to strawberry, lemon to lime and mouth-watering orange, everyone will find their favourite flavour.
Bite into a fruit gum and release a burst of fruity flavour that lasts until the end. They're so delicious we don't add any artificial colours, flavours, or preservatives. Make the most of every moment with the satisfyingly chewy fun of Rowntree's Fruit Gums.

name: Minstrels Chocolate Bag
long_description: Silky smooth and creamy Galaxy chocolate captured in a crispy shell. Our chocolatiers have spent years perfecting the elements of our Galaxy products, with thousands of hours designing even the tiniest details, from the soft corners and undulating flow of our bar to the finely milled cocoa that makes every mouthful as silky as the last. Through research, we have identified three distinct 'stages of taste' when enjoying a Galaxy moment: 1. The release of the signature taste of our Galaxy products during the first bite. It is unmistakably smooth and creamy and has been loved by the nation for generations. 2. The sustained presence of its characteristic caramel notes, as the silky Galaxy chocolate slowly melts in your mouth. 3. The distinctive pleasure of our Galaxy products - that silky smooth flavour, lingering indulgently long after the chocolate experience, promoting a deep sense of relaxation. So next time you enjoy a piece of Galaxy chocolate, why not linger over it a little longer, to ensure you unapologetically Choose Pleasure? Suitable for Vegetarians.

long_description:
Quick to prepare and a true pantry staple, Bisto Favourite Gravy Granules are as convenient as they are delicious. Pair with beef, use in stews or soups or turn your leftover roast into a delicious main dish. Apart from being delicious with beef and other meats, Bisto Favourites Gravy Granules offer a quick and easy way to thicken your sauces and gravies. To prepare, simply mix an appropriate amount of Bisto granules with boiling water and stir.

  • Delicious on beef and other meats

  • 51 servings per pack

  • Low in Sugar (when prepared as directed with water)

name: Old English Mustard
long_description: Colman's is a brand of English mustard, known for its distinctive, surprisingly hot and fiery flavor with a classic British taste that's perfect for sandwiches, meats, and salads. The mustard, founded in 1814, uses a blend of locally grown brown and white mustard seeds, resulting in an intense, bold flavor with a spicy kick, a smooth texture, and a hint of turmeric and wheat for its characteristic warmth.

Raro Sweet Navel Orange is a flavoured beverage mix with vitamin C. Simply mix with water to make 1L of delicious orange drink. Made with no artificial sweeteners and containing vitamin C, Raro Sweet Navel Orange is a perfect summer beverage to bring to your next picnic or pack into your lunchbox. Conveniently packed into 80g sachets, Raro Sweet Navel Orange brings the flavour without the fuss. Serve chilled or add to a jug of water with sliced fruit for a tasty fruit punch.

  • Sweet navel orange flavour

  • Perfect for Summer

  • Made with no artificial sweeteners

name: Tomato Sauce
long_description:
New Zealand's favourite tomato sauce, Wattie's Tomato Sauce is made with no artificial colours, flavours or preservatives. A must-have at barbecues, Wattie's Tomato Sauce is the most versatile condiment around. Wattie's Tomato Sauce is a true pantry staple. Enjoy with your steak, sausages, fish and chips, quiches or keep it plain and simple with some salty hot chips. Wattie's Tomato Sauce is the taste Kiwis know and love - it's not a meal without Wattie's Tomato Sauce.
  • No artificial colours or flavours

  • No preservatives

  • Versatile condiment for roast meat, pies and hot chips

  • New Zealand's favourite tomato sauce

  • A must-have at barbecues

name: Hawke's Bay Black Doris Plum & Roasted Almonds Dark Chocolate
long_description:
• Plum and Almond pieces & Creamy Milk Chocolate
  • 50% Dark Chocolate: Crafted with the finest ingredients.
  • Rainforest Alliance Certified: Ethically sourced and sustainable. 
  • Palm Oil & GMO Free: Pure natural quality
  • Made in New Zealand
Whittaker's New Zealand Black Plum & Almond is a beautifully balanced creation, blending the tart sweetness of New Zealand black plum pieces with the crunch of roasted almonds, all enrobed in our rich 50% Cocoa Dark chocolate. A sophisticated taste of New Zealand in every bite.

Perfect Pairing
The vibrant, fruity notes of New Zealand black plum are perfectly complemented by the nutty crunch of roasted almonds. Together, they create a delicious contrast against the depth and smoothness of our 50% Cocoa Dark chocolate. Like all Whittaker's creations, it's Rainforest Alliance Certified for ethically sourced indulgence.

Pure Quality
Free from palm oil and GMOs, Whittaker's NZ Black Plum & Almond 100g block is crafted with the finest ingredients for pure, natural quality. Proudly made in New Zealand, it's a decadent and distinctly Kiwi flavour experience.

Savour the bold, fruity richness of Whittaker's NZ Black Plum & Almond - a dark chocolate delight with a uniquely local twist.
  • Rainforest Alliance Certified

  • Palm Oil Free

  • GMO Free

  • Made in New Zealand

name: Ocean Blue Lemonade
long_description:
The original, and now famous, Calypso Traditional Lemonade was created in 1985 with the simple idea of making delicious, traditional lemonade with real lemons and real sugar.
idea has grown into a range of authentic, non-carbonated beverages, reminiscent of the freshly squeezed, homemade lemonade served at neighbourhood lemonade stands. Enjoy ice cold or mixed with a clear spirit.

  • Calypso Ocean Blue Lemonade 473mL

  • Vibrant product with strong fridge appeal

  • Made with blueberries, blackberries, blue raspberries and lemon to create a unique flavour

  • No artificial colors and preservatives

  • Has a tamper proof resealable cap

  • Suitable for all store types including cafes and P&C.

  • Country of Origin: USA.
ingredients: water, lemons and sugar

name: Branflakes With Raisins
description: COLES I'M FREE FROM BRANFLAKES WITH RAISINS:250G
long_description:
• Gluten and wheat free
    • High in fibre
    • Good source of vitamin B2 and folate


  • Looking for a delicious and wholesome breakfast routine? Grab a spoon because you just found it. Meet Coles I'm Free From Branflakes, your new breakfast buddy.


    You'll show up for the daily intake of vitamin and fibre goodness; you'll stay for the satisfying crunch and toasty flavour. And then you'll get hit with that sweet twist of raisins and wonder how you ever got going in the morning without it.


    Made from a blend of rice and corn bran, Coles I'm Free From Branflakes are gently steamed and toasted to bring you perfect crunch. They're so good you'll double-check the box to make sure they're gluten-free and wheat-free. (Rest assured, they are.)


    And when you pair your new favourite flakes with almond or oat milk...? Oh, what a bountiful morning. Whether you have gluten or wheat allergies or intolerance, or you're just intolerant of boring breakfasts, our humble, delicious, nourishing I'm Free From Branflakes with Raisins are everything a breakfast should be.

name: Brazilian Cheese Bread
long_description:
The history of Pao de Queijo begins over 400 years ago in the rich farmlands of the newly discovered Brazil.

Pao de Queijo is literally translated from Portuguese as cheese bread, a snack food that was so irresistible that it quickly spread throughout the country. Brazilian everyday life has become ingrained with the legend of Pao de Queijo, ever-present at special events and gatherings.

With a history of bringing people together and lifting their spirits during lunch, dinner or whenever hunger strikes...

Pao de Queijo is something that has to be tried to be believed!

name: Weet-bix Breakfast Cereal Gluten Free Berry Crunch 400g
description: SANITARIUM WEET-BIX BREAKFAST CEREAL GLUTEN FREE BERRY CRUNCH 400G
long_description:
Introducing Weet-Bix Gluten Free Berry Flavour Crunch from Sanitarium. With a tasty crunch and delicious berry flavoured rice puffs, plus the wholegrain goodness of Weet-Bix - and gluten free! It's made from sorghum, a naturally gluten free ancient grain. A great way to start your day!

  • Gluten free
  • High in vitamins B1, B2 and B3
  • High in antioxidant vitamin E*
  • Source of dietary fibre
  • High in folate
  • Source of magnesium
  • One bowl of Weet-Bix Gluten Free Berry Flavour Crunch provides over ½ your daily wholegrain needs**
  • MONASH University Low FODMAP Certified. One serving of Weet-Bix Gluten Free is low in FODMAPs- Endorsed by Coeliac Australia
  • Endorsed by Coeliac Australia & New Zealand


How can Weet-Bix be gluten free?
Gluten Free Weet-Bix is made from red sorghum grains - not wheat grains.

What is Sorghum?
Sorghum is an ancient grain which is naturally gluten free.

How is it made?
Gluten Free Weet-Bix are made the same way as regular Weet-Bix, except in a separate factory, dedicated to producing gluten free products.

* What are the benefits of Vitamin E? As part of a balanced diet, Vitamin E helps protect against cell-damaging free radicals. 
** One 33g serve of Weet-Bix Gluten Free Berry Flavour Crunch contributes 57% of the 48g whole grain Daily Target Intake.
*** One serving of Weet-Bix Gluten Free is low in FODMAPs.
  • Gluten Free

  • High in vitamins B1, B2 & B3 and antioxidant vitamin E

  • Source of dietary fibre

  • High in folate

  • Source of magnesium

  • One bowl of Weet-Bix Gluten Free Berry Flavour Crunch provides over 1/2 your daily wholegrain needs* *One 33g serve of Weet-Bix Gluten Free Berry Flavour Crunch contributes 57% of the 48g whole grain Daily Target Intake..

  • MONASH University Low FODMAP Certified** **One serving of Weet-Bix Gluten Free is low in FODMAPs..

  • Endorsed by Coeliac Australia.
ingredients: Wholegrain sorghum (83%), rice flour (7%), golden syrup, sugar, natural flavours, rice bran, sunflower oil, salt, vegetable concentrate (radish, carrot), vitamins (E, B3, B1, B2, folate), mineral (iron), natural sweetener (steviol glycosides), antioxidant (rosemary extract).

name: Gluten Free Artisan Crackers Fig & Sunflower Seed
description: OLINA'S BAKEHOUSE GLUTEN FREE FIG & SUNFLOWER SEED
long_description:
Olina's Bakehouse brings friends, family, and flavours together with delicious artisan crackers. Spark lively conversation with creative flavour combinations by making our range of artisan crackers the centrepiece for your next gathering.

Loaded with tasty figs and crunchy seeds, Olina's Bakehouse Fig & Sunflower Seed Gluten Free Artisan Crackers are the perfect accompaniment to your cheese board for any entertaining or social occasion.

Share in the delicious flavour combinations with Olina's Bakehouse Artisan Crackers for long lunches, BBQ's, birthday celebrations, festive entertaining, christmas, new years, easter, spring carnival or casual get togethers with family and friends.

Or why not indulge in the delicious flavour combinations at any time of the year, accompanied by cheese, cold meats, olives, pickles, fruit paste, fresh fruit, dips and honey, or enjoy the unique texture and flavour of Olina's Bakehouse premium quality specialty Biscuits all by themselves.
  • Gluten Free

  • Delicious Fig & Sunflower Seed Gluten Free Crackers

  • Perfect for entertaining

  • Packed with Fig & Sunflower Seed

  • Made in Australia

Hart & Soul - we are passionate about creating real flavours of the world, made from the very finest natural ingredients. Inspired from our travels and made from traditional recipes, enjoy the natural taste of tradition. KONJAC - WHAT IS IT? An Asian root vegetable similar to potato in texture, but without the starchiness. Noodles made from konjac are high in fibre and low in carbohydrates.
ingredients: Water, Konjac Noodles (23%) (Water, Konjac Powder, Firming Agent (Calcium Hydroxide)), Beef (8%), Onion, Fish Sauce, Sugar, Spices, Chili, Salt, Coriander, Basil, Garlic.
allergens:

May Contain Cashew, Crustacean, Egg, Peanut, Sesame, Soy

name: Gluten Free Chocolate Pudding 2 Pack
description: AUNT BETTY'S GLUTEN FREE CHOCOLATE PUDDING 2PK 190GRAM
long_description: Deliciously light and fluffy and steamed, just so. Indulge in some of the most delicious puddings you'll ever taste with Aunt Betty's oh so good Chocolate flavoured Gluten Free Steamy Puds. Chocolate is everyone's favourite of course - and to make it even better its Gluten Free. This Steamy Pud is a steamed light sponge made from premium cocoa smothered in a dreamy thick chocolate flavoured sauce. Serve it with vanilla bean ice cream for a mouth watering dessert to finish off your meals. Contains no artificial colours or flavours. name: Gluten Free Puff Pastry Sheets
description: SIMPLY WIZE GLUTEN FREE PUFF PASTRY SHEETS 540G
long_description:
Create delicious golden flaky pastries with Simply Wize Gluten Free Puff Pastry Sheets 540g. This 4 sheet pack of gluten free vegetarian puff pastry is perfect for baking savoury pies, pastry rolls, tarts, and sweet treats with ease.

Ideal for home bakers looking for a reliable gluten free pastry option, Simply Wize puff pastry delivers a light, buttery texture and beautiful rise without compromising on flavour.

Made without gluten and suitable for vegetarian diets, these sheets make it easy to prepare homemade pies, sausage rolls, or fruit danishes simple and satisfying.

If you're searching for gluten free puff pastry sheets, vegetarian pastry, or easy gluten free baking sheets, Simply Wize is the perfect choice for your freezer staple.

  • Golden, flaky texture - Bakes to a light, crisp finish with a buttery taste and beautiful rise.

  • Gluten free and vegetarian - Perfect for those with coeliac disease, gluten sensitivity, or on a vegetarian diet.

  • Versatile baking essential - Ideal for savoury pies, pastry rolls, tarts, danishes, and more.

  • Convenient 4-sheet pack - Pre-cut and ready to use straight from the freezer.

  • No compromise on flavour or texture - Delivers the same puff and crunch you'd expect from traditional pastry.

  • Reliable and easy to work with - A go-to choice for home bakers and busy cooks..

  • Freezer-friendly staple - Keep on hand for quick and easy gluten free baking any time..

  • Great for sweet or savoury recipes - Whether it's apple turnovers or veggie rolls, the possibilities are endless..

name: Pasta Gluten Free Spaghetti
description: BARILLA PASTA GLUTEN FREE SPAGHETTI:.:340 GRAM
long_description:
Barilla Gluten Free Spaghetti n.5 stays true to tradition with strands of pasta that look like string.
Our range of gluten-free pasta is ideal for those with coeliac disease or gluten intolerance. Certified gluten-free, it's made from white and yellow corn and brown whole-grain rice.
Try it with eggplant, zucchini, garlic, and chives for a modern dinner idea everyone will love.
From our short shapes like Barilla Gluten Free Fusilli or Penne Rigate to longer variations such as Gluten Free Spaghetti, you can find the perfect gluten-free pasta for any recipe.
At Barilla, we're passionate about pasta and have shared our passion with the world since 1877. We strive to make Barilla Gluten Free Pasta and Italian Sauces that are good for you and the planet.

  • Certified gluten-free

  • Endorsed by Coeliac Australia

  • with non-GMO ingredients

  • No wheat ingredients

  • Produced on a dedicated gluten-free line
ingredients: white corn flour (60%), yellow corn flour (29.5%), rice flour (10%), water, emulsifier (mono and diglycerides of fatty acid from vegetable origin).
